name: Project suggestion
about: Suggest an AI-native production system for the atlas

labels: project-suggestion
assignees: ""

## Language

- [English](#english)
- [中文](#中文)

---

## English

### Project

Name:

URL:

### Business Scene

Which scene does it belong to?

- [ ] App / Website / Product Prototyping
- [ ] UI Design / Design-to-Code
- [ ] Video / Media / Creative Production
- [ ] Software Engineering / Code Delivery
- [ ] Game / Interactive Artifacts
- [ ] Research / Knowledge / Evidence Reporting
- [ ] Document / Presentation / Content Production
- [ ] Data Analytics / BI / Finance
- [ ] Sales / GTM / Business Automation
- [ ] Other

### Core Business Object

What object does the system organize?

Examples: repo, PR, video project, app, source set, report, spreadsheet, lead table.

### Operating Model

How does it make the business object AI-operable?

Examples: pipeline-first, canvas-first, repo-first, notebook/source-grounded, spreadsheet-first, table-first, timeline/transcript-first.

### Evidence

Add official docs, repo, product page, demo, or screenshots.

### Why It Belongs

Explain why this is more than a chatbot, one-shot generator, model API, or ordinary SaaS feature.

---

## 中文

### 项目

名称：

URL：

### 业务场景

它属于哪个场景？

- [ ] 建站 / App 搭建 / 产品原型
- [ ] UI 设计 / 设计到代码
- [ ] 视频 / 媒体 / 创意生产
- [ ] 软件工程 / 代码交付
- [ ] 游戏 / 互动内容生产
- [ ] 研究 / 知识发现 / 证据报告
- [ ] 文档 / 演示 / 内容生产
- [ ] 数据分析 / BI / 财务分析
- [ ] 销售 / GTM / 业务自动化
- [ ] 其他

### 核心业务对象

系统组织的对象是什么？

示例：repo、PR、video project、app、source set、report、spreadsheet、lead table。

### 操作模型

它如何让这个业务对象变成 AI 可操作对象？

示例：pipeline-first、canvas-first、repo-first、notebook/source-grounded、spreadsheet-first、table-first、timeline/transcript-first。

### 证据

添加官方文档、仓库、产品页、demo 或截图。

### 为什么属于这里

说明它为什么不只是聊天机器人、一次性生成器、模型 API 或普通 SaaS 功能。
